title: avenula bromoides subsp. arundana
intro: Avenula bromoides subsp. arundana, also known as oat grass or false oat-grass, is a perennial grass native to Europe and Western Asia. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic compounds that can help soothe digestive issues and reduce pain. The health benefits of Avenula bromoides subsp. arundana include its ability to alleviate symptoms of irritable bowel syndrome, such as bloating and cramps, as well as its potential to support the immune system. The plant can be prepared for herbal use by infusing the leaves and roots in hot water, or by drying them to create a tincture or tea.
